description: The FontMaterial component is a Legacy component that was used for rendering text.

fields.OutlineThickness: The thickness of the outer border of the characters.
fields.OutlineColor: The color of the outer border on characters.
fields.FaceSoftness: How much to soften the edges of the characters to make them not so sharp.
fields.FaceDilate: How much to puff up the characters and make them more bold.
fields._convertedMaterial: The converted material version of this material.
